# truenas_share_nfs (Data Source)

Provides information about an NFS share on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_share_nfs" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "nfs_path" {
  value = data.truenas_share_nfs.example.path
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric NFS share ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `aliases` (List of String) Export path aliases.
- `comment` (String) Free-form comment.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the share is enabled.
- `hosts` (List of String) Authorized client hosts.
- `mapall_group` (String) Map all requests to this group.
- `mapall_user` (String) Map all requests to this user.
- `maproot_group` (String) Map root to this group.
- `maproot_user` (String) Map root to this user.
- `networks` (List of String) Authorized networks (CIDR notation).
- `path` (String) Exported filesystem path.
- `read_only` (Boolean) Whether the share is read-only.
- `security` (List of String) Allowed security flavors.
